question_text:
Permutations

Given an array `nums` of distinct integers, return all the possible permutations. You can return the answer in any order.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: We use backtracking by swapping elements to generate all permutations in-place. For each position, we swap the element with all subsequent elements and recurse. O(N * N!) time complexity.
